articles.title: Shiba Inu whales are buying SHIB, but is the whale pressure enough for a bull run?
articles.description: Shiba Inu [SHIB]’s recovery back above the $0.000010 price level is an important sign that it has experienced significantly strong demand. This is especially the case after bottoming out slightly below $0.0000080 in June. But should investors be buying considering the latest outcome? SHIB’s current price floor is a good sign that there is strong […]

articles.title: The Doge Father, Elon Musk, Withdraws from $44B Deal to Purchase Twitter
articles.description: Summary: Elon Musk wants to terminate his $44 billion bid to buy Twitter. He cites that Twitter has breached multiple agreed-up provisions by making false and misleading representations concerning the number of spam and fake accounts. The Twitter board is committed to seeing the deal through to the end. Tesla CEO and Space X founder Elon Musk is seeking to withdraw his $44 billion bid to purchase...

articles.title: Twitter Says It Won't Let Elon Musk Go as 'Dogecoin CEO' Terminates Deal
articles.description: A major legal battle, involving the crypto community's preferred social media platform Twitter, and Dogecoin (DOGE) advocate, Tesla's Elon Musk, is in the works. After the serial entrepreneur said he's terminating his agreement to buy Twitter in a USD 44bn deal, the company vowed to fight back.... Read More: Twitter Says It Won't Let Elon Musk Go as 'Dogecoin CEO' Terminates Deal
